passives.name: Jungle Companions
passives.effects: Summon a ''Scorchclaw Pup'' companion to assist you in combat against monsters.

passives.name: Scorchclaw's Slash
passives.effects: Feed your companion enough treats to evolve it and upgrade your {{si|Smite}}. Upon the companion reaching its final evolution, this item is consumed, granting you the {{bi|Scorchclaw's Slash}} buff.

effects_structured.raw: Summon a Scorchclaw Pup companion to assist you versus monsters.
Companion evolves by consuming treats and upgrades Smite.
At final evolution, the item is consumed and grants Scorchclaw's Slash.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Scorchclaw Pup is modeled as a no-sell jungle starter that summons a companion and progresses via treat collection to Smite upgrade and final-evolution buff grant.
Final evolution consumes the starter item and grants the Scorchclaw's Slash buff.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
